message.content: Let's start building the payment integration.

content.text: I'll set up the Stripe integration. Let me check the existing payment models.

message.content: We decided to go with Stripe over PayPal because of better developer experience.

content.text: Good choice. Stripe's API is much cleaner. Let me implement the webhook handler.

message.content: Now let's add subscription billing. I want monthly and yearly plans.

content.text: I'll create the subscription plans using Stripe's Billing API. Monthly at $10/mo and yearly at $100/yr.

message.content: Make sure we handle proration when switching between plans.
The webhook handler needs to handle checkout.session.completed and invoice.payment_failed events.

content.text: I'll add handlers for both events. For checkout.session.completed, we'll provision the subscription. For invoice.payment_failed, we'll send a notification and retry logic.

message.content: Also, always use idempotency keys for Stripe API calls to prevent duplicate charges.

content.text: Absolutely. I'll generate idempotency keys based on the operation + entity ID combination. This prevents duplicate charges even if the request is retried.
